title: Blue Stingray Lounger (188 x 145 cm) 1 Pc. - Comfortable & Stylish Design, Perfect for Pool Parties, Beach, Summer Relaxation, Family Fun, & More
features: STYLISH & UNIQUE DESIGN: Make a splash at your next pool party with the blue stingray lounger (188 x 145 cm), featuring an eye-catching stingray design that's both comfortable and fashionable.
BUILT TO LAST: Our blue stingray lounger is constructed from durable material that ensures long-lasting fun, so you can enjoy endless summer relaxation.
REPAIR KIT INCLUDED: Accidents happen, but with the included repair kit, you can patch up any punctures and keep the good times going.

MULTIPURPOSE FUN: Perfect for pool parties, chilling at the beach, family gatherings, or simply kicking back in your backyard, this blue stingray lounger is the ultimate addition to your summer adventures.
SAFETY FIRST: For added peace of mind, this inflatable lounger comes equipped with two robust PVC handles, providing you with extra stability as you lounge on the water.
description: The blue stingray lounger (188 x 145 cm) 1 pc. is the perfect accessory for your summer relaxation. Its comfortable and stylish design is ideal for pool parties, beach outings, or simply enjoying a sunny day in your backyard. Measuring 188cm x 145cm, this lounger provides ample space for you to unwind. The unique stingray design adds a touch of fun and charm, making it a hit among both kids and adults. So whether you're looking for family fun or a quiet space to soak in the sun, the blue stingray lounger is your go-to choice for the summer.
